headline: TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) – A Fundamentally Sound Dividend Growth Play
summary: TE Connectivity passes a strict dividend screener with strong profitability and health ratings, offering a stable 1.43% yield, low 28.84% payout ratio, and 7.55% annual dividend growth.
